summary.en: Tech-driven commercial insurance brokerage offering real-time data, business insurance, and total rewards.
summary.zh: 以技術驅動的商業保險經紀公司，提供即時數據、企業保險與整體獎酬方案。

highlight.en: Newfront set out to modernize the insurance brokerage with transparent, real-time data, serving 20% of US unicorns and 150+ public companies. It reached a $2.2B valuation in 2022 and agreed to be acquired by WTW in December 2025.
highlight.zh: Newfront 致力於以透明、即時的數據翻新保險經紀業，服務美國 20% 的獨角獸與超過 150 家上市公司。公司於 2022 年達到 22 億美元估值，並在 2025 年 12 月同意被 WTW 收購。

funding.en: Valued ~$2.2B in 2022; raised ~$310M; acquired by WTW (2025)
funding.zh: 2022 年估值約 22 億美元；累計募資約 3.1 億美元；2025 年被 WTW 收購

sources.title: Newfront Announces $200 Million Investment at $2.2B Valuation

summary.en: Automated compliance and trust management platform for SOC 2, ISO 27001, and other security frameworks.
summary.zh: 自動化合規與信任管理平台，支援 SOC 2、ISO 27001 等安全框架。

highlight.en: A breakout YC W18 company, Vanta automated the painful path to security compliance and now serves over 12,000 organizations. It was valued at $4.15B in a July 2025 Series D, up from $2.45B a year earlier.
highlight.zh: 作為 YC 2018 冬季班的明星公司，Vanta 自動化了繁瑣的安全合規流程，目前服務超過 12,000 家組織。公司在 2025 年 7 月的 D 輪募資中估值達 41.5 億美元，較一年前的 24.5 億美元大幅成長。

funding.zh: 最新估值約 41.5 億美元（2025）；累計募資約 5.04 億美元

sources.title: Compliance startup Vanta valued at $4.15B in new $150M round - SiliconANGLE
Vanta raises $150M Series C, now valued at $2.45B | TechCrunch

summary.en: Automated background screening platform delivering instant identity, court, education, and employment checks.
summary.zh: 自動化背景調查平台，即時提供身分、法院案件、學歷與工作經歷查核。

highlight.en: Pitched as a 'Checkr for India', HelloVerify replaces slow, manual, document-heavy background checks with an instant, cost-effective tech platform. It helps corporates and startups prevent fraud by objectively verifying individuals before hiring.
highlight.zh: 定位為「印度版 Checkr」，HelloVerify 以即時、低成本的技術平台取代緩慢、人工且文件繁重的背景調查，協助企業與新創在招聘前客觀驗證個人身分以防範詐欺。

summary.en: All-in-one finance operating system for businesses, bundling accounts, payments, FX, credit, and expense tools.
summary.zh: 企業一站式財務作業系統，整合帳戶、支付、外匯、信貸與費用管理工具。

highlight.en: Aspire is building the 'Salesforce of finance' for Southeast Asian businesses, going beyond what a bank, bookkeeper, or rewards program could do alone. It has raised over $400M from backers including Sequoia Capital SEA, Lightspeed, and PayPal Ventures.
highlight.zh: Aspire 致力於為東南亞企業打造「財務界的 Salesforce」，提供超越銀行、記帳服務或回饋方案的整合能力。公司已從 Sequoia Capital SEA、Lightspeed 與 PayPal Ventures 等投資人募得超過 4 億美元。

funding.en: Raised ~$406M total; backers incl. Sequoia SEA, Lightspeed, PayPal Ventures
funding.zh: 累計募資約 4.06 億美元；投資人含 Sequoia SEA、Lightspeed、PayPal Ventures

sources.title: Aspire closes US$100M Series C round - Aspire
Singapore fintech Aspire lands $158m Series B funding

summary.en: Application security platform that analyzes in-app execution in real time to protect APIs and microservices.
summary.zh: 應用程式安全平台，即時分析應用內執行行為以保護 API 與微服務。

highlight.en: Sqreen offered a runtime, in-app approach to application security trusted by more than 800 organizations, rather than relying on pattern matching. It was acquired by Datadog in 2021 to anchor Datadog's application security product line.
highlight.zh: Sqreen 採用執行期、應用內的安全防護方式，獲超過 800 家組織信任，而非倚賴模式比對。公司於 2021 年被 Datadog 收購，成為 Datadog 應用程式安全產品線的核心。

funding.en: Acquired by Datadog (2021, terms undisclosed); raised ~$16M prior
funding.zh: 2021 年被 Datadog 收購（金額未公開）；先前募資約 1,600 萬美元

sources.title: Datadog to acquire application security platform Sqreen | TechCrunch

summary.en: Platform that digitizes and automates complex clinical care workflows for patients and clinicians.
summary.zh: 將複雜臨床照護流程數位化與自動化的平台，服務病患與醫護人員。

highlight.en: Memora converts clinical workflows into automated messaging journeys that guide patients and cut care-team notifications by nearly 40%. Backed by a16z and General Catalyst, it was acquired by healthcare AI company Commure in December 2024.
highlight.zh: Memora 將臨床流程轉化為自動化的訊息引導旅程，協助病患並將照護團隊的通知量減少近 40%。公司獲 a16z 與 General Catalyst 支持，並於 2024 年 12 月被醫療 AI 公司 Commure 收購。

funding.en: Acquired by Commure (Dec 2024, all-stock); backers a16z, General Catalyst
funding.zh: 2024 年 12 月被 Commure 以換股方式收購；投資人含 a16z、General Catalyst

sources.title: Medical AI company Commure buys Memora Health | Axios

summary.en: Health insurance for mid-sized companies that aims to cost 20% less while improving medical care.
summary.zh: 為中型企業打造的健康保險，目標降低 20% 成本並提供更有效的醫療照護。

highlight.en: Evry Health builds health insurance for mid-sized employers, combining lower premiums with more effective, technology-driven care. It targets the gap between expensive traditional plans and self-funded insurance.
highlight.zh: Evry Health 為中型雇主打造健康保險，結合更低保費與更有效、技術驅動的照護，鎖定昂貴傳統方案與自保型保險之間的市場缺口。

summary.en: People, performance, and culture management software covering reviews, OKRs, 1:1s, and engagement surveys.
summary.zh: 人才、績效與文化管理軟體，涵蓋績效考核、OKR、一對一會談與敬業度調查。

highlight.en: Qulture.Rocks built a performance and culture operating system used by around 1,000 corporate customers, backed by Founders Fund, Sequoia, and Tiger Global. The Brazilian SaaS company was acquired by UOL EdTech in April 2022.
highlight.zh: Qulture.Rocks 打造的績效與文化作業系統服務約 1,000 家企業客戶，獲 Founders Fund、Sequoia 與 Tiger Global 支持。這家巴西 SaaS 公司於 2022 年 4 月被 UOL EdTech 收購。

funding.en: Acquired by UOL EdTech (2022, terms undisclosed); backers Founders Fund, Sequoia
funding.zh: 2022 年被 UOL EdTech 收購（金額未公開）；投資人含 Founders Fund、Sequoia

sources.title: Foley Represents Qulture.Rocks in Acquisition by UOL EdTech

summary.en: Autonomous driving technology that retrofits existing farm tractors to automate common field tasks.
summary.zh: 自動駕駛技術，可加裝於既有農用曳引機以自動化常見田間作業。

highlight.en: Bear Flag Robotics tackled the farm labor shortage by retrofitting tractors with a camera, LiDAR, and radar autonomy stack for 360-degree awareness. John Deere acquired the startup for $250 million in 2021 to accelerate autonomous farm equipment.
highlight.zh: Bear Flag Robotics 透過為曳引機加裝結合攝影機、光達與雷達的自駕系統來解決農業勞動力短缺問題，提供 360 度環境感知。John Deere 於 2021 年以 2.5 億美元收購該公司以加速自動化農機發展。

funding.zh: 2021 年被 John Deere 以 2.5 億美元收購

sources.title: John Deere buys autonomous tractor startup Bear Flag Robotics | TechCrunch
John Deere acquiring Bear Flag Robotics for $250M | The Robot Report

summary.en: Full-stack grocery delivery in Latin America bringing ultra-fresh produce to doorsteps in under two hours.
summary.zh: 拉丁美洲全棧式生鮮雜貨外送，於兩小時內將超新鮮農產品送達府上。

highlight.en: Founded by Stanford engineers, Calii connects directly with producers and runs micro-fulfillment centers to deliver ultra-fresh groceries with less waste and lower prices. It is chasing LatAm's largely offline, multi-trillion-dollar grocery market.
highlight.zh: 由史丹佛工程師創立，Calii 直接對接生產者並營運微型履約中心，以更少浪費與更低價格配送超新鮮雜貨，鎖定拉美仍以線下為主、規模達數兆美元的雜貨市場。

summary.en: Companionship and family-care platform pairing older adults with 'Papa Pals' for in-home help and support.
summary.zh: 陪伴與家庭照護平台，為長者媒合「Papa Pals」提供到府協助與支持。

highlight.en: Papa scales 'family-on-demand' care, connecting seniors with Papa Pals for companionship, errands, and transportation, backed by SoftBank, Tiger Global, and Initialized. A 2021 Series D made it a unicorn at a $1.4B valuation.
highlight.zh: Papa 擴展「隨需家庭照護」服務，為長者媒合 Papa Pals 提供陪伴、跑腿與接送，獲 SoftBank、Tiger Global 與 Initialized 支持。2021 年的 D 輪募資使其以 14 億美元估值躋身獨角獸。

funding.en: Valued $1.4B at 2021 Series D; raised ~$240M; backers SoftBank, Tiger Global
funding.zh: 2021 年 D 輪估值 14 億美元；累計募資約 2.4 億美元；投資人含 SoftBank、Tiger Global

sources.title: In-Home Companionship Company Papa Raises $150M, Reaches Unicorn Status - Home Health Care News
SoftBank backs Papa's $150M Series D | Fierce Healthcare

summary.en: Agentic AI platform that automates HR, IT, and finance employee support across enterprise systems.
summary.zh: 代理式 AI 平台，跨企業系統自動化 HR、IT 與財務的員工支援。

highlight.en: Leena AI deploys an AI virtual assistant that answers employee questions and resolves tickets for enterprises like Coca-Cola, Sony, and Nestlé, freeing up HR/IT/finance teams. It has raised over $40M from backers including Bessemer and Greycroft.
highlight.zh: Leena AI 部署 AI 虛擬助理，為 Coca-Cola、Sony、Nestlé 等企業回答員工問題並處理工單，減輕 HR、IT 與財務團隊的負擔。公司已從 Bessemer、Greycroft 等投資人募得超過 4,000 萬美元。

funding.en: Raised ~$40M total; backers Bessemer, Greycroft, Elad Gil
funding.zh: 累計募資約 4,000 萬美元；投資人含 Bessemer、Greycroft、Elad Gil

founders: Adit Jain, Mayank Goyal, Anand Kumar Prajapati

sources.title: Leena AI - Crunchbase Company Profile & Funding
Agentic AI for the Enterprise Back Office | Leena AI
